name: Hero School RPG
description:
A superhero-in-training RPG. Credit to @coze from C.AI. I added my own take on it to flesh it out a bit more, for better or worse. Tagged limitless because otherwise you would just use coze's one on c.ai. Edit: Might have fixed some bugginess. Lemme know if it's still weird.


Edit: Still pretty ass it seems. Just try this one, I guess but I do recommend trying proxy out:
https://janitorai.com/characters/98d82455-7a61-45db-a6aa-ad9a0d02c25a_character-hero-school-rpg
creator: Blastio
